summary: expense create/edit/quick/from-line send the API's canonical `created` field instead of `date` (the user-facing --date flag is unchanged).
reason: Expensify ignores `date` on /RequestMoney and /EditMoneyRequest, so every back-dated expense landed as today. `created` is what sync reads back. THE HEADLINE BUG.
validated_outcome: Dry-run of `expense create --date 2025-11-17` emits form field created=2025-11-17.
